title: TypeScript, JavaScript, and the TypeScript 7 Toolchain · Type-System Trace: Erasure Emission
summary: Trace a service-status module through TypeScript 7 checking, JavaScript emission, module loading, and runtime behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts erasure emission increment in a compiler-to-runtime evidence notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict which TypeScript constructs erase, transform, or affect emitted JavaScript and source maps.
Distinguish compile-time type evidence from emitted JavaScript and runtime validation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
